channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE down to 1,000 people in Minnesota as surge ends; will be below 500 later this week
item.description: Homeland Security has now withdrawn the vast majority of immigration officers it had surged to Minnesota, leaving fewer than 1,000 ICE personnel still...

item.title: Calls for Gonzales to resign grow louder from fellow House Republicans
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert of Colorado on Monday became the first of several House Republicans to call on Rep. Tony Gonzales to resign after allegations surf...

item.title: States Should Put Workers First with Private Sector Labor Reforms
item.description: It’s no accident that right-to-work states have the highest net domestic population growth.

item.title: Chicagoans name snowplow 'Abolish ICE' in annual contest
item.description: When it comes to putting a name to Chicago's annual battle against its infamously inclement weather, it turns out that the practical is also the polit...

item.title: We Need a Vote on Iran
item.description: A decision as consequential as this one deserves a real debate in Congress.

item.title: Majority Of Virginians Oppose Dems’ Gerrymander, But It’s Up To GOP To Get Out The Vote
item.description: A majority of Virginia residents do not support the Democrats’ attempt to gerrymander the commonwealth’s congressional districts, according to a new p...

item.title: Gavin Newsom Is The New Joe Biden (Inarticulate And Lowkey Racist)
item.description: If a Republican had said what Newsom said, the guilty verdict would already be in.

item.title: Democrat White Men Keep Impersonating Obama, And It’s So Uncomfortable To Watch
item.description: After hearing the name “James Talarico” for several weeks, I finally got my first visual and audio impression of him, and it’s the same one I had when...

item.title: 'Flawed response': Top House Republicans, Pentagon challenge airline safety bill
item.description: Top House lawmakers and the Defense Department spoke out in opposition Monday to aviation safety legislation that Speaker Mike Johnson hopes to rush t...

item.title: An ‘Acceptable War’
item.description: Why does the MAGA base now seem to approve of an approach to war they supposedly sought to reject?

item.title: Body of civil rights leader Jesse Jackson is to lie in state in South Carolina
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. will be honored at the South Carolina capitol in the state where he was born and where his crusade career as a civil rights...

item.title: SCOTUS Takes Up Oil Companies’ Challenge To Colorado City’s Climate Lawfare
item.description: Boulder officials claimed that these oil companies' 'fossil fuel activities contributed to climate change, causing harm to Boulder’s property and resi...

item.title: The Supreme Court Makes a Prudent Ruling on the Trump Tariffs
item.description: The Court’s decision aligns with the Framers’ views of presidential authority.

item.title: Punch The Monkey’s Viral Orphanhood Is The Perfect Reminder That Babies Need Their Moms
item.description: Compassion for Punch the monkey’s viral orphanhood should extend to babies deprived of their mothers via third-party reproduction.

item.title: Would You Believe That Democrats Were Not Anti-Israel Enough in 2024?
item.description: Even left-of-center analysts have thrown cold water on the far left’s self-flattering narratives.
